feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Position with item category OPHU in the EWM delivery remains in the ECC queue with the error.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m facing the following issue: In the decentralized EWM, we create a packing item (OPHU), which is supposed to update the delivery in ECC by adding the new item upon confirmation. However, the data record gets stuck in the queue (ECC inbound) with the error "Item 0020 does not exist."

What puzzles me is that the new items are not listed in NEW_ITEM_DATA but rather under ITEM_DATA.

Can anyone help with this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Getting error during reporting missing HU in PI process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We couldn"t be able to report missing HU via RF getting below error where bin having single HU and can be able to report missing HUs where Bin having more than one HU.

Error: Not all quants for product 51431704 were counted; no save possible (/SCWM/UI_PI026).

Regards,

Santhosh

entry.title: SAP EWM WAREHOUSE OBD KITS WITH MATERIAL VALUE
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

Looking for a report to show OBDs for picked-not issued material but including the material value and the work order for each line . I can extract every material picked KIT OBD's through the warehouse monitor Outbound delivery but wasn't able to find any report showing both (work order number and material value for picked material ) not sure if there's one including both but will appreciate your help .

Thank you

entry.title: FM/BAPI for Stock data transfer in EWM
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I would like to know the solution for EWM - Initial stock upload for warehouse including with/without handling units. 

I'm aware of the file upload approach in /SCWM/ISU t-code. However, we encountered performance issues while using this approach and it is taking a lot of time to create the documents as we have to extend for multiple warehouses and the data volume is huge.

As you already aware that we have to perform this activity during the black out phase only since it is a transactional data and the business shouldn't get impacted if its getting delayed.

Hence, I request you to suggest multiple options on how to proceed by considering all the pros and cons. Please let me know in case any standard FM/BAPIs/APIs that are available which meets our requirement to upload this data.

I look forward to hear more from you.

#EWM #SCWM/ISU

Thanks,

Vishwa

entry.title: Integration
entry.content:
Curious to understand how Transportation in the category of 5 PL to be integrated with SAP S/4 Hana in a real-time way ? 
Is there any live environment?

entry.title: Migration Object EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,Regarding data migration, we usually (on-premise and private) use:/scwm/isu: ewm stock/scwm/sbup: storage binAssign fixed bin (is there a massive?)Which are the related ones in Public cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: rounding differences valuated stock in transit
entry.content:
Hello,

we use a two step stock transfert process using valuated stock in transit (S/4, ML active).

If material is posted from one plant to the stock in transit of the same plant (same plant, same price), a price difference (rounding difference ?) of 1 cent arises, which is then posted to a price variance account.

Can anyone explain how/why this price variance occurs and whether it can be prevented?

Regards,

Sabine

entry.title: /SCWM/ISU can't post with external amount
entry.content:
Hello,

As per 2021 Released for EWM we can posting migration stock with amount. I've tried to input this amount but no material document is created. How to resolve this ?

 

Best regards,

 

EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Excise Invoice Goods Receipt Procedure India with EWM
entry.content:
Referring to help.sap document related to External Procurement (Imports) in country India.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/240fcdcc71c640ea9aa9691500b34889/889ad7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html

Legal requirement to capture excise invoices for Bills of Entry.  Procedure refers only to Entering of Goods Receipt in MM via Migo where pop-up will appear at GR posting to capture excise invoice number for the Bill of Entry. 

Request for information how this procedure needs to be executed with the use of SAP EWM when GR is posted in SAP EWM and communicated back to ERP.

entry.title: Automatic arrival at Door and Activate it
entry.content:
I need to do auto activation of the Door.

Once we assign the door to the TU, in RFUI or via any FM, we should be able to activate the door. Currently we can just activate the TU on RFUI. But there is no such functionality to activate the door.

SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: Delivery based EWM -PP Integration,STO's and Transfer posting doc's are not created in EWM with MF60
entry.content:
Hi Guru's ,WIth Delivery based EWM PP integration, in MF60, selected EWM pick parts release parts,and created replenishment proposals and did staged the replenishment elements for a prodcution order.

In EWM ,  i couldn't able to see any transfer posting doc's or STO , doc's .

Am i missing any config setting on WM staging in S4 . ?? For info, adequate stock is there in the Final bins with F2 . DEL_PROD is the PSA which is mapped to PROD Sloc .Created all EWM the configs. But still couldn't able to generate the replenishment doc's in EWM.

 

Please help me in this regard.

Attached is the screen shots for the same.

B regards,

Viswanath.

MF60:

Couldn't able see any log's in SLG1.

entry.title: How do I find the system inventory on hand during a cycle count? Which tables do I look in?
entry.content:
I am creating a report outside of SAP in a data warehouse that contains SAP tables. I am trying to build a view that shows the result of cycle counts and how much they are off by the inventory in the system, how often the counts are off, etc.

I think I have found the cycle count data in the IKPF and ISEG tables, field ISEG.MENGE has the difference in quantity from the count. What I am looking for is what the system inventory number was at the time of the count. Which tables should I use for that where I can tie it back to the time of that Cycle Count?

Would LINK and LINP tables hold these system inventory numbers? And if so, how do I join them to IKPF and ISEG? 

Or, should I be using MSEG? I see that there is a direct link between ISEG and MSEG, but I don't know which fields in MSEG would hold the System Inventory numbers at the time of count.

Any thoughts?

entry.title: Diff_analyzer not posting
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

Kindly help me with a situation have long been stuck, I have created a diff_Analzer document on July 07th 2024 and counted on the same day, I am trying to post the documents now, it is not allowing to post, showing the batch is associated with the product and cannot be posted. We have a separate bin created for the difference in the quantities are posted from that bin.

entry.title: BAPI /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT to Receive HUs for EWM MES integration
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP has provided standard function module /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT to Receive HUs for EWM MES integration. Also EGR is mandatory for this BAPI.

This BAPI was working fine while using decentralized EWM as we create EGR . But in embedded EWM this BAPI was not helpful to receive HU's from production. Any suggestion on how to receive HU's from MES in embedded EWM without EGR .

Help is highly appreciated

entry.title: Stock room management vs Basic EWM vs EWM
entry.content:
I wonder if someone can direct me in these questions:

1. Is Stock Room Management a solution that is being phased out right now? End of life? This is "old wm?"

2. Is it still a valid options for implementations for mid-size companies? Key features that is missing in this?

3. Basic EWM... key features that is missing vs Full-EWM?

entry.title: SAP EWM Good s receipt "partially complete 1 of the HU IIIOUSA0011055 cannot be reversed
entry.content:
I have one Inb delivery ERP 70255415 , unloaded but partially put away . Good s receipt "partially complete as 1 of the HU IIIOUSA0011055 cannot be reversed, delete or put away , created by mistake. How can I complete the receiving for the remaining line item .It was It ticket  created from Business side.

Thanks,

Janmeet

entry.title: EWM Packspec create with 0 Qty
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Is there a way to make below value 0 in packspec, user will decide qty at the time of receipt.

entry.title: How is maximum length at /SAPAPO/MAT1 really working?
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I want to ask for your support with a question about the maximum length found in the material master data on EWM S/4HANA (/SAPAPO/MAT1, or MM03).

According to the documentation, this field specifies the maximum length of the products that can be packed inside the packaging material, and it differs from the length of a unit of the packaging material.

For testing purposes, I have maintained 4 CM as maximum length in the packaging material CTN_02 and I have packed in /SCWM/PACK a product with length 706 MM. I was expecting an error message, or at least a warning, but the system allowed me to go ahead with no restriction at all.

Once packed, the handling unit now had 24 CM of length, which is the length in the master data for the packaging material. But the product, which has 70.6 CM as length, was packed successfully into a packaging material with 4 CM as max. length.

So how does this maximum length actually works? Is is just an statistical value, or is it really restricting any products with longer lengths to be packed? If this should show an error/warning message, can you share a case where it actually works?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: ECC-EWM-GTS Export Declaration “Before PGI in EWM” -Bonded Warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Good Day

I have below requirement, kindly share your valuable inputs to define the FCD process in BWH.

Standard behaviour : SO -> Del -> ODO- > PGI in EWM ->OD->ECC-Material document-> GTS Export declaration, in this scenario export declaration created in GTS has all the required data and there is no issue here.

I think when the PGI is done in EWM, material document created in ECC, hope that is the reference to GTS for doing the “Export declaration”

Required behaviour: SO -> Del - > ODO->Picking Complete-> “NO” PGI in EWM -> Export declaration in GTS

This is for Free Circulation stocks.

Is there any process, with which we can do the “Export declaration” before PGI in EWM?

This is due to operational challenges as after PGI immediately the shipment leaves the facility and with in which if the customs clearance (from duty unpaid to duty paid) is not received, it will be an issue.

And hence we want to keep the PGI as last step, ie. After export declaration process is completed, business wants to print some carrier labels and want to post the goods issue and then shipment leaves physically. This would give enough time for FCD  process to customs.

Note: Client system is on EWM Decentral 9.5 and ECC 6.0

Look forward for your valuable advise.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

@sapewm SAP Community @GTS

entry.title: Mass upload of Customizing in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hii Everyone,

I have to do a customizing activity of maintaining Hu types for each storage bin type in SPRO>SCM>EWM>GOOD RECEIPT PROCESS>STRATEGIES>STORAGE BIN DETERMINATION>HU TYPES>DEFINE HU TYPES FOR EACH STORAGE BIN TYPES.

I have around 7000 entries that need to be maintained which is a lot to do manually. I was wondering if there was a way around it to do it by mass upload.

Any help and info is appreciated.

 

Best regards,

Rashmi Bhandari
